title: NGE Sexual Metaphor
wikitext:
[]: NGE Sexual Metaphor             Quote Post by pen-pen » Fri Jun 10, 2011 1:29 am After going through most of the topics here. I noticed something: that the whole NGE is a metaphor on sexual intercourse- over & over again... It all boils down to: 1) EVAs = Penis 2) Breaking of AT Field = Penetration 3) Angel's Core = Clitoris 4) Explosion after Angel is defeated = Orgasm This is repeated every time an EVA is 'fighting/killing' an angel.....

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Jun 10, 2011 1:46 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Fri Jun 10, 2011 1:49 am 1) X-Wings = Penis 2) Getting into the trench = Penetration 3) Exhaust vent = Clitoris 4) Death star exploding = Orgasm Need I say more, or should I examine every work of fiction until I show that this "metaphor" exists everywhere because it's so easy to turn things into phallic, penetrative and orgasmic imagery?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri Jun 10, 2011 1:51 am Legendary wrote: 1) X-Wings = Penis 2) Getting into the trench = Penetration 3) Exhaust vent = Clitoris 4) Death star exploding = Orgasm Need I say more, or should I examine every work of fiction until I show that this "metaphor" exists everywhere because it's so easy to turn things into phallic, penetrative and orgasmic imagery?

[]:             Quote Post by Rei Makes You Go Splat » Fri Jun 10, 2011 9:54 am Legendary wrote: 1) X-Wings = Penis 2) Getting into the trench = Penetration 3) Exhaust vent = Clitoris 4) Death star exploding = Orgasm Need I say more, or should I examine every work of fiction until I show that this "metaphor" exists everywhere because it's so easy to turn things into phallic, penetrative and orgasmic imagery?

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Fri Jun 10, 2011 10:01 am The core IS very clearly shown to = a clit in EoE, and piercing it sure as hell makes the MP Evas (And possibly Unit 01) orgasm. The AT Field protects "The sacred part of me that none may enter" as Kaworu put it, which can totally have sexual as well as emotional connotations. So I think it has some credibility considering all the sexual imagery. So, to take the Star Wars counter-point: 1) X-Wings = Penis.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Jun 10, 2011 10:32 am According to Anno ripping the AT Field was supposed to have image of "violation" - but while this is easy to see as sexual it doesn't look like it was strictly intended as such though it would be pretty bloody hilarious if that was the case. All Angel fights would just turn into rapefests for thematic reasons better left unasked

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Fri Jun 10, 2011 10:40 am Shamshel was pretty darn phallic, and Shinji 'violated' it pretty good... ... Shinji likes teh buttsex?

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Fri Jun 10, 2011 12:14 pm

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Jun 10, 2011 12:23 pm liquidus118 wrote: Shinji likes teh buttsex?

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Fri Jun 10, 2011 12:37 pm

[]: Re: NGE Sexual Metaphor             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jun 10, 2011 1:07 pm pen-pen wrote: 2) Breaking of AT Field = Penetration

[]: Re: NGE Sexual Metaphor             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Fri Jun 10, 2011 1:10 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: So, I don't know if this is specifically a sex reference. There are just some forms of penetration that lead to orgasmic climax, and others that result in death, and others that just result in someone finally opening up emotionally to someone else. Evangelion explores all these forms of penetration.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Jun 10, 2011 1:13 pm Isn't Orgasm called "Little Death" sometimes...? /silly

[]: Re: NGE Sexual Metaphor             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jun 10, 2011 1:16 pm Shogo-Kun wrote: Dude, you just gave me an idea to use the "penetration" symbolism in all three forms! Penetration that leads to orgasmic climax followed by an emotional upheaval and finally... DEATH!! I'm totally gonna use that!

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Fri Jun 10, 2011 1:57 pm ...why is Evangelion the only animated show I've watched where almost every damn thing is related to my penis?

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Fri Jun 10, 2011 2:02 pm C.A.P. wrote: ...why is Evangelion the only animated show I've watched where almost every damn thing is related to my penis?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jun 10, 2011 2:25 pm C.A.P. wrote: ...why is Evangelion the only animated show I've watched where almost every damn thing is related to my penis?

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Fri Jun 10, 2011 2:29 pm C.A.P. wrote: ...why is Evangelion the only animated show I've watched where almost every damn thing is related to my penis?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jun 10, 2011 2:44 pm BiQ wrote: Because only Evangelion has a fandom with a hard-on for shoehorned psychology.
